title: Heritage 2BR at Tiong Bahru Road — Walking Distance to MRT
raw_copy: A rare chance to own in one of Singapore's most beloved heritage estates. This 2-bedroom apartment along Tiong Bahru Road is a comfortable 10 min walk to Tiong Bahru MRT, perfect for owner-occupiers who enjoy a stroll. A 14 min drive gets you to Raffles Place in light traffic. The neighbourhood offers a dense cluster of amenities — cafés, bakeries, and a well-loved wet market — within 10 minutes on foot. A 12 min walk brings you to Zhangde Primary School, a convenient option for families. Street view captures the iconic art-deco shophouses that define the area; see for yourself before you visit. 818 sqft, well-kept, asking S$1,320,000. Honest listing — come see the place.

claims.raw_text: 10 min walk to Tiong Bahru MRT
14 min drive to Raffles Place in light traffic
dense cluster of amenities — cafés, bakeries, and a well-loved wet market — within 10 minutes on foot
12 min walk brings you to Zhangde Primary School
Street view captures the iconic art-deco shophouses
